name: Cranberry or Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together.
2. Beat eggs in a separate bowl.
3. Add butter and milk to the eggs.
4. Combine the liquid and the dry ingredients with a few stirs.
5. Fold into the batter, before the dry ingredients are completely moistened--either the blueberries or the cranberries.
6. Fill well greased muffin pans 2/3 full.
7. Bake in a 400 degree preheated oven for 20-25 minutes.
